CREATE TABLE test_strings (str1 String, str2 String);
SELECT str1, str2, damerauLevenshteinDistance(str1, str2) AS distance FROM test_strings;
SELECT str1, str2 FROM test_strings WHERE damerauLevenshteinDistance(str1, str2) < 3;
SELECT str1, str2 FROM test_strings WHERE damerauLevenshteinDistance(str1, str2) = 0;
SELECT str1, str2, damerauLevenshteinDistance(str1, str2) AS distance FROM test_strings ORDER BY distance;
CREATE TABLE another_strings (id Int32, str1 String, str2 String);
SELECT a.id, damerauLevenshteinDistance(a.str1, b.str2) AS distance FROM test_strings a JOIN another_strings b ON a.str1 = 'clickhouse';
SELECT a.str1, b.str2, damerauLevenshteinDistance(a.str1, b.str2) AS distance FROM test_strings a, another_strings b WHERE distance < 5;
WITH (SELECT str1 FROM test_strings) AS t1, (SELECT str2 FROM test_strings) AS t2 SELECT damerauLevenshteinDistance(t1, t2) FROM t1, t2;
